next_steps: Initiate empiric intravenous antibiotic therapy for suspected sepsis/meningococcemia
Perform a complete blood count with peripheral smear and inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR)
Perform urinalysis to assess for hematuria and proteinuria
Obtain an echocardiogram to evaluate for coronary artery abnormalities
Consult pediatric rheumatology for suspected systemic vasculitis
